name: Ab Rollout
instructions: Kneel with an ab wheel, roll forward keeping core tight, roll back to start.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Stand with a barbell at thigh-height, curl to shoulder level keeping elbows pinned, lower with control.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge at the hips, back flat, pull the bar to your lower ribs, squeeze the shoulder blades, lower slowly.

name: Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench, grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder width, lower to chest, press up.

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back, hands behind head, alternate bringing opposite elbow to opposite knee.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Stand in front of a box, swing arms, jump onto the box landing softly, step down.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Rear foot on a bench, front foot planted, lower the back knee toward the floor, drive up through the front heel.

name: Burpee
instructions: From standing, drop to a plank, do a push-up, jump feet to hands, jump up with arms overhead.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel facing a high pulley, rope behind your head, crunch down bringing elbows toward thighs.

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Stand between two pulleys set high, arms wide, bring hands together in front of your chest in an arc.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Seated at a row machine, pull the handle to your waist, squeeze the shoulder blades, return with control.

name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand at a high pulley, elbows pinned to sides, push the bar straight down until arms lock out.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on a calf-raise platform, lower heels below the step, then press up onto the balls of your feet.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Hang from a bar with underhand grip, pull your chin over the bar, lower with control.

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Seated, elbow braced on inner thigh, curl the dumbbell up to shoulder, lower slowly.

name: Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back, knees bent, curl the shoulders off the floor by contracting the abs, lower slowly.

name: Cycling
instructions: Ride a stationary or outdoor bike at steady or interval pace for the planned duration.

name: Deadlift
instructions: Bar over mid-foot, hinge to grip, chest up, drive the floor away, stand tall, lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at your sides, curl one or both up to shoulder height, lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Lie on a flat bench, arms wide with a slight elbow bend, bring dumbbells together above chest in an arc.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Seated or standing, dumbbells at shoulder height, press overhead until arms lock, lower with control.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Rope at face height, pull toward your face while flaring elbows out, squeeze the rear delts.

name: Farmer Carry
instructions: Hold a heavy dumbbell in each hand, walk upright with braced core for the prescribed distance.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back, feet flat, drive hips up by squeezing the glutes, lower slowly.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Stand with dumbbells, palms facing each other, curl to shoulder height keeping wrists neutral.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from a bar, raise straight legs to hip or chest height, lower with control.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: Upper back on a bench, barbell across hips, drive hips up until fully extended, lower with control.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Bench at 30 to 45 degrees, press dumbbells from shoulder level to lockout, lower to chest.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Skip rope at a steady tempo with short ground contacts for the planned duration.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hinge at the hips, swing the kettlebell between your knees, drive hips forward to float it to chest height.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Seated at a pulldown station, pull the bar to your upper chest, squeeze the lats, return slowly.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at sides, raise arms out to shoulder height, slight bend in elbows, lower slowly.

name: Seated Leg Curl
instructions: Seated at a leg-curl machine, curl the pad toward the back of your thighs, return with control.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Seated at a leg-extension machine, extend your legs until knees are straight, lower slowly.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Feet shoulder-width on the platform, lower until knees reach 90 degrees, press back without locking out.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Step forward into a lunge until both knees are at 90 degrees, drive up and step through with the other leg.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Bar at the shoulders, brace core, press overhead until arms lock, lower to the shoulders.

name: Plank
instructions: Forearms on the floor, body in a straight line from head to heels, hold for time while bracing the core.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from a bar with overhand grip, pull your chin over the bar, lower with control.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Hands shoulder-width, body in a straight line, lower chest to the floor, press back up.

name: Band Pull-Apart
instructions: Hold a band at shoulder height, pull ends apart until arms are wide, return with control.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Bar in hands, hinge at the hips pushing them back, slide the bar down the thighs, return by driving hips forward.

name: Rowing Machine
instructions: Seated on a rower, drive through the legs, pull the handle to the sternum, return by extending arms then hinging.

name: Running
instructions: Run outdoors or on a treadmill at the planned pace for the prescribed duration or distance.

name: Seated Row (Machine)
instructions: Chest on the pad, pull handles to your ribs, squeeze the shoulder blades, return slowly.

name: Skullcrusher
instructions: Lie on a bench with an EZ-bar above your chest, lower to the forehead by bending the elbows, press back up.

name: Back Squat
instructions: Bar across upper back, feet shoulder-width, descend until thighs are parallel, drive up through the heels.

name: Tricep Dip
instructions: Hands on parallel bars or a bench, lower until elbows hit 90 degrees, press back up to lockout.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold a dumbbell overhead with both hands, lower behind your head by bending elbows, press back up.

name: Wrist Curl
instructions: Forearm on a bench, palm up, curl the dumbbell up with the wrist only, lower slowly.
